description: Machine-readable catalog of signing-time danger primitives. Each entry matches by canonical mainnet programId plus a leading instruction discriminator byte. Severity drives the verdict: any REJECT entry forces REJECT; any HOLD entry forces at-least HOLD. mapsToLoss is the concrete real-world loss the primitive enables. See ../references/danger-catalog.md for rationale.

entries.label: SPL Token SetAuthority
entries.mapsToLoss: Hands mint/freeze/owner authority to an attacker, who can then mint, freeze, or seize at will.

entries.label: Token-2022 SetAuthority
entries.mapsToLoss: Same as SPL SetAuthority plus control of Token-2022 extension authorities (transfer hook, fee config, etc.).

entries.label: Token-2022 PermanentDelegate (configure/use)
entries.mapsToLoss: A permanent delegate can move or burn tokens from any holder irrevocably; configuring or exercising it is a seizure vector.

entries.label: BPF Loader Upgradeable: Upgrade
entries.mapsToLoss: Replaces a program's executable bytecode; an attacker can swap in a draining program instantly (instant rug).

entries.label: BPF Loader Upgradeable: SetAuthority
entries.mapsToLoss: Transfers a program's upgrade authority, enabling a later upgrade-rug under attacker control.

entries.label: BPF Loader Upgradeable: SetAuthorityChecked
entries.mapsToLoss: Transfers a program's upgrade authority (checked variant), enabling a later upgrade-rug under attacker control.

entries.label: BPF Loader Upgradeable: Close
entries.mapsToLoss: Closes a buffer/programdata account and drains its lamports; can destroy a program's upgrade data or sweep funds to an attacker.

entries.label: System: Assign (ownership change)
entries.mapsToLoss: Reassigns an account's owner program to an arbitrary program, handing it full control of the account's data and lamports.

entries.label: System: AssignWithSeed (ownership change)
entries.mapsToLoss: Reassigns a seed-derived account's owner program to an arbitrary program, handing over control of the account.

entries.label: System: TransferWithSeed
entries.mapsToLoss: Transfers lamports out of a seed-derived account whose authority the signer controls; direct SOL outflow via a less-obvious path than a plain Transfer.

entries.label: System: AdvanceNonceAccount (durable nonce)
entries.mapsToLoss: Durable nonces remove blockhash expiry, so a signed transaction can be held and replayed later -- the core enabling vector of the Drift 2026 blind-signing incident.

entries.label: System: Initialize/Authorize NonceAccount
entries.mapsToLoss: Initializes a nonce account or redirects its authority, setting up or hijacking a durable-nonce hold/replay vector.

entries.label: SPL Token Approve / ApproveChecked
entries.mapsToLoss: Grants a delegate authority to spend tokens from the account; a malicious delegate can silently drain it afterward.

entries.label: SPL Token CloseAccount
entries.mapsToLoss: Closes a token account and sweeps its rent lamports to a destination that may be attacker-controlled.

entries.label: System Transfer above threshold
entries.mapsToLoss: Direct SOL outflow from the signer above the configured threshold (default 1 SOL = 1,000,000,000 lamports).
